core_coaching_methodology.description: Coaches use freeze-play interventions to correct positioning mistakes in real-time, and ask targeted questions rather than lecturing to develop player decision-making and gauge learning retention.

practices.name: Academy Playing Philosophy 7v7 (3-2-1) Small Sided Game

setup.team_alignments: Both teams structured in a 3-2-1 formation

coaching_focus: Observation and correction of structural positioning on the pitch.
Maximizing space by opening up wide and long.
Encouraging attacking movements such as overlapping runs.
procedural_notes: The coach stops the game immediately when a mistake occurs to explain it contextually.
Players rotate positions every 10 minutes to develop holistic spatial awareness and role competence.
A formal mid-session tactical review is conducted halfway through to reinforce crucial principles.

coaching_scenarios.problem: A player is static and not providing support.
coaching_scenarios.expected_player_response: Overlap: Now the defence has a problem!

practices.name: Build Up Play Options 7v7 (3-2-1) Small Sided Game
practices.variation: 5a (Option 1): Central Midfielder's Decision to Pass or Switch Play
tactical_objectives: Adjusting midfield and fullback lines to create passing lanes out of the back.
Pre-receipt scanning (checking shoulders) and maintaining an open body shape.
Selecting the optimal passing line to progress, recycle, or switch the point of attack.
practices.main_coaching_focus: The Central Midfielder's decision-making process to combine via a central wall-pass or switch play wide based entirely on the structural positioning of the opponent and the attacking fullback.

positional_roles.Centre Back (CB): Distribute calmly, prioritize penetrative forward passes when open, or recycle possession safely.
positional_roles.Full Backs (LB / RB): Stagger lines by dropping deep or pushing advanced to alter the opponent's defensive reference points.
positional_roles.Central Midfielders (CM): Provide underlying support, execute pre-scanning, and dictate whether to use a wall-pass or switch play.
positional_roles.Forward (F): Act as a focal point by dropping short into pockets of space or stretching the opponent by running in behind.

coaching_tips.key_takeaway: Utilizing the 3-2-1 shape inherently teaches youth players how to maximize the full width and depth of a football pitch while encouraging rapid, tight combination play inside the blocks.
